name: steer
description: Engineering standards for GitHub Copilot (CLI and VS Code). On the Copilot CLI this manifest loads steer's skills and a Copilot-native hook set; in both surfaces the always-on rules are delivered as .github/copilot-instructions.md and the skills as .github/prompts/*.prompt.md (installed by /steer:init), since Copilot has no context-injecting SessionStart hook.
